nasb.text: The God who made the world and all things in it, since He is Lord of heaven and earth, does not dwell in temples made with hands;

esv.text: The God who made the world and everything in it, being Lord of heaven and earth, does not live in temples made by man,

cnv.text: 創造宇宙和其中萬有的　神，既然是天地的主，就不住在人手所造的殿宇，

ccb.text: “这位创造宇宙万物的上帝是天地的主宰，并不住在人手建造的庙宇里，

csbs.text: 造了宇宙和其中万有的神，这一位既然是天地的主，就不住在人手所造的殿宇里，
